COLLECTOR-COLLECTED_PILE.title: Collected Pile
COLLECTOR-COLLECTED_PILE.description: This contains the Collected cards you have yet to draw this combat. You draw one card from this at the start of each turn.
COLLECTOR-KINDLE.title: Kindle
COLLECTOR-KINDLE.description: Summon a [gold]Torchhead[/gold]. If one is already summoned, increase its Max HP for this combat.
